creator: yds@CoolRat.org
text:
New RubyGem port of the single most extensive additions and extensions
library available for Ruby http://Facets.RubyForge.org/

Until this port is commited a tarball can be fetched from
http://yds.CoolRat.org/freebsd/rubygem-facets.tbz

How-To-Repeat: cd devel/rubygem-facets
make install
